title: Gate Maintenance, Upgrades, Metrics, and Capstone · Failure Case: Policy Ratchets
summary: Operate a reusable repository template without letting gates rot or overwhelm contributors. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates policy ratchets increment in a reusable quality-gated repository template. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Raise standards gradually with changed-code gates and expiring debt records.
Schedule compatibility-tested tool and runtime upgrades with rollback paths.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Policy Ratchets evidence
steps.instruction: Append a gates-policy-ratchets-tmkp7k: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Policy Ratchets into observable performance evidence.

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
